G

game - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
 
Game - Class in com.example._0tazo.model
Orchestrates the Cincuentazo game: manages player order, turn progression, player elimination, and the win condition.
Game(int) - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
Constructs a new game with one human player and the specified number of computer players (1, 2, or 3).
game1 - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.model.GameTest
 
game3 - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.model.GameTest
 
GameController - Class in com.example._0tazo.controller
Controller for the main game view (GameView.fxml).
GameController() - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.controller.GameController
 
GameException - Exception in com.example._0tazo.model.exception
Base checked exception for all domain-specific errors in the Cincuentazo game.
GameException(String) - Constructor for exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException
Constructs a GameException with the given detail message.
GameException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException
Constructs a GameException with a detail message and a cause.
GameException.EmptyDeckException - Exception in com.example._0tazo.model.exception
Thrown when a card is requested from the deck but both the main deck and the discard pile are empty, making it impossible to deal any card.
GameException.InvalidTurnException - Exception in com.example._0tazo.model.exception
Thrown when a player attempts to take an action outside of their turn.
GameException.PlayerEliminatedException - Exception in com.example._0tazo.model.exception
Thrown when an eliminated player attempts to perform any game action.
GameException.SumExceededException - Exception in com.example._0tazo.model.exception
Thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50, violating the main rule of Cincuentazo.
gameOver - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
Whether the game has ended.
GameTest - Class in com.example._0tazo.model
Unit tests for Game.
GameTest() - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.model.GameTest
 
GameTimer - Class in com.example._0tazo.utilities
Manages the two timer threads used during a Cincuentazo game: General timer â€” runs for the entire game, firing ITimerListener.onTick(int) every second so the controller can update the elapsed-time label in the UI. Machine turn timer â€” fires once after a random delay of 2â€“4 seconds (ITimerListener.onMachineTurnReady()) to simulate the computer "thinking", then fires again after 1â€“2 seconds (ITimerListener.onMachineDrawReady()) to simulate drawing.
GameTimer(ITimerListener) - Constructor for class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Constructs a GameTimer with the given event listener.
generalPaused - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Controls whether the general timer is paused.
generalRunning - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Controls whether the general timer is running.
generalTimerThread - Variable in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
The general game timer thread.
getAttemptingPlayer() - Method in exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.InvalidTurnException
 
getBackColor() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
 
getCard(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.AbstractPlayer
Returns the card at the given hand index.
getCard(int) - Method in interface com.example._0tazo.model.IPlayer
Returns the card at the given hand index.
getCardImage() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
Returns the filename of the image that represents this card's current state.
getCardValue() - Method in exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.SumExceededException
 
getCurrentPlayer() - Method in exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.InvalidTurnException
 
getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
 
getCurrentSum() - Method in exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.SumExceededException
 
getDeck() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
 
getDeckSize() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
 
getElapsedSeconds() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.utilities.GameTimer
Returns the total seconds elapsed since the general timer started.
getHand() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.AbstractPlayer
Returns a copy of the hand list.
getHand() - Method in interface com.example._0tazo.model.IPlayer
Returns a copy of the hand list.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example._0tazo.view.SceneManager
Returns the single instance of SceneManager.
getName() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.AbstractPlayer
Returns the player's display name.
getName() - Method in interface com.example._0tazo.model.IPlayer
Returns the player's display name.
getNumber() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
 
getPlayableIndices(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.ComputerPlayer
Returns a list of all hand indices that are legally playable given the current table sum.
getPlayerName() - Method in exception com.example._0tazo.model.exception.GameException.PlayerEliminatedException
 
getPlayers() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
 
getSuit() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
 
getTable() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
 
getTableCard() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
 
getTableSum() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
 
getTableSum() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Table
Returns the current table sum.
getTopCard() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Table
Returns the top card of the discard pile â€” the last card played on the table â€” without removing it.
getValue(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Card
Returns the integer value this card contributes to the table sum, following the Cincuentazo rules: 2â€“8 and 10: add their face value. 9: adds 0 (neither adds nor subtracts). Jack, Queen, King: subtract 10. Ace: adds 10 if the result would not exceed 50; otherwise adds 1.
getWinner() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.model.Game
 
goToGame(int) - Method in class com.example._0tazo.view.SceneManager
Navigates to the game screen and initializes it with the given number of machine players.
goToSelection() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.view.SceneManager
Navigates to the machine selection screen.
goToWelcome() - Method in class com.example._0tazo.view.SceneManager
Navigates to the welcome screen.
